results.title: McDavid... Matthews?: Kings Clearing Space for 'Superstud LA-Type' Signing
results.description: Whether it’s Quinton Byfield or now Brandt Clark, at some point, the next wave in Los Angeles has to drive the bus for a Kings team that’s still trying to hang around in a tough Western Conference.

results.title: Washington Commanders are retiring Hall of Famer John Riggins' No. 44 on Nov. 8
results.description: The Washington Commanders are retiring John Riggins' No. 44 during a ceremony during the upcoming NFL season. The Hall of Fame running back will be honored at halftime of the team's game against the Los Angeles Rams on Nov. 8....
